name: secret-scan-gate (cinatra-ai required check)
description: Org-standard thin caller for the secret-scan gate in cinatra-ai/ci, double-pinned to a tagged release SHA. Scans the PR diff range for committed secrets and fails CI on a finding. The org ruleset baseline-protection requires the context 'secret-scan-gate / secret-scan-gate' on every default branch, so every new repo needs this workflow seeded.
